content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLMs can be fundamentally improved by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision. This combined framework resolves the key limitation of vanilla Self-Refine's single-perspective feedback that often gets stuck in local optima for code and open-ended generation tasks.
